items.title: Monitoring started: Penobscot County Probate Court

page_lines: Register of Probate: Hilari K. Simmons
The Register of Probate is an elected county position with a
. These officials are elected to oversee the county probate office, which handles:

Adoptions of Minors and Adults, Guardianships /Conservatorships of Minors and Adults, Name Changes, Wills and Estates, Trusts, and Name Changes. The position is established by the Maine Constitution, with elections held every four years. The Probate Office staff is appointed by the Register.
